task: Advanced high-economic-value task: ATAC-Seq Peak Reproducibility Rescue Decision. Context: a launch gate owner needs a numerical decision packet before approving a high-value production or release change for atac-seq peak reproducibility rescue decision in the computational biology domain. Embedded packet: records: R1 unique_fragments_m=47 tss_enrichment=3.82 frip=0.221 replicate_pass=0.686; R2 unique_fragments_m=25 tss_enrichment=6.92 frip=0.228 replicate_pass=0.597; R3 unique_fragments_m=43 tss_enrichment=8.59 frip=0.238 replicate_pass=0.911; R4 unique_fragments_m=53 tss_enrichment=7.37 frip=0.154 replicate_pass=0.623; normalized_threshold_score=72.5; remediation_budget_usd=95000; options: O1 targets the unique_fragments_m driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 12% cost=29450, O2 targets the tss_enrichment driver and reduces normalized risk contribution by 18% cost=44650, O3 targets the replicate_pass margin driver and improves normalized margin by 9% cost=51300; source_excerpt="deliverable must include traceable calculations, assumptions, and acceptance criteria". Rules and constraints: margin = normalized_threshold_score - observed_risk_score; negative margin is fail, margin from 0 to 5% of the limit is warn, and larger positive margin is pass; remediation options may be combined only if total cost<=remediation_budget_usd; expert-review flag is required when any record changes classification after a 5% sensitivity shift; all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: construct the reproducible workbook or script, document every assumption, and provide a concise expert memo for signoff. Deliver atac_reproducibility_qc.tsv + qc_decision.md with formulas or executable logic, intermediate calculations, row-level citations to the embedded packet, explicit assumptions, validation checks, sensitivity notes where relevant, and a final decision table. Do not invent inputs, substitute outside data, or hide uncertainty; mark any unresolved ambiguity as needs_review.
